data.title: Swatch's 'Up In Smoke' Watch Is The Low-Key Flex Of 4/20 Season
data.description: Swatch's smoky green Up In Smoke watch is vibing once again—just in time for the season. Launched in 2024, but feels right now.

data.title: Trump's Tariffs Just Slammed The IPO Window Shut For Fintech
data.description: It was shaping up to be a domino year—if one IPO popped, others like Stripe, Ramp, and Brex could follow. But now, the opposite seems likely.

data.title: Eli Lilly Rallies Over 14%, Notches Best Day Since June 2000 On Oral Weight-Loss Drug Results: Analysts React
data.description: Lilly's weight-loss drug trial shows promising results, propelling stock up 14.36%. Goldman Sachs predicts potential $23.5B in sales by 2035.

data.title: Billionare Investor Bill Ackman Posts Hertz Investment Thesis, Proposes AV Fleet Partnership With Uber
data.description: Billionaire hedge fund manager Bill Ackman posted his investment thesis for Hertz on Thursday, one day after disclosing his fund, Pershing Square, had built a sizable stake in the car rental company.

data.title: Netflix Crushes Q1, Says It's 'Working Hard To Improve And Expand' Its Offering
data.description: Netflix reported Q1 results, which for the first time didn't include subscriber totals or quarterly gains. Here are the key highlights from the report.
